claim: Hematopoietic Stem Cell purification reaches purity rate of up to 50%.

result.claim: Hematopoietic Stem Cell purification reaches purity rate of up to 50%.
result.reasoning: The claim states that Hematopoietic Stem Cell purification reaches a purity rate of up to 50%. However, evidence from paper 10165258 (Proposition ID: prop_1026, Chunk ID: chunk_167) indicates that "Approximately 75% of cells in a highly enriched long-term repopulating HSC (LT-HSC) pool (Lin(-)Sca1(+)c-Kit(hi)CD150(+)CD48(-)) are quiescent." This suggests that a highly enriched HSC population can achieve a purity of at least 75%, which is significantly higher than the "up to 50%" stated in the claim. This directly refutes the upper limit of 50% mentioned in the claim.

evidence.text: Approximately 75% of cells in a highly enriched long-term repopulating HSC (LT-HSC) pool (Lin(-)Sca1(+)c-Kit(hi)CD150(+)CD48(-)) are quiescent.
evidence.source: GATA-3 regulates hematopoietic stem cell maintenance and cell-cycle entry.

evidence.text: Leukocyte count was defined as high or low according to a cut point of 9 × 10(9)/L.
evidence.source: Inflammatory biomarkers and exacerbations in chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.

evidence.text: Cancer stem cell eradication is crucial for successful anticancer therapy.
evidence.source: PU.1-mediated upregulation of CSF1R is crucial for leukemia stem cell potential induced by MOZ-TIF2

evidence.text: Delayed T cell recovery and restricted T cell receptor diversity after allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation are associated with increased risks of infection and cancer relapse.
evidence.source: Quantitative assessment of T-cell repertoire recovery after hematopoietic stem cell transplantation

evidence.text: Mass spectrometry-calibrated intracellular flow cytometry was used on human hematopoiesis.
evidence.source: Contractile forces sustain and polarize hematopoiesis from stem and progenitor cells.

evidence.text: Human neurons were derived from induced pluripotent stem cells.

evidence.text: In adult tissues the main subset of T cells are memory T cells.

evidence.text: Human embryonic-stem-cell-derived embryoid bodies generate a KDRlow/C-KIT(CD117)neg population after induction with activin A, bone morphogenetic protein 4 (BMP4), basic fibroblast growth factor (bFGF, also known as FGF2), vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF, also known as VEGFA) and dickkopf homolog 1 (DKK1) in serum-free media.
evidence.source: Human cardiovascular progenitor cells develop from a KDR+ embryonic-stem-cell-derived population

evidence.text: Recipients of T cell-depleted peripheral-blood stem cell grafts had 28-fold lower CD4(+) T cell diversities after 6 months.
evidence.source: Quantitative assessment of T-cell repertoire recovery after hematopoietic stem cell transplantation

evidence.text: Recipients of T cell-depleted peripheral-blood stem cell grafts had 14-fold lower CD8(+) T cell diversities after 6 months.
evidence.source: Quantitative assessment of T-cell repertoire recovery after hematopoietic stem cell transplantation

evidence.text: Identification of DNA of HPV types 16 and/or 18, or RNA from the five most carcinogenic HPV types allows selecting women at highest risk for CIN3+
evidence.source: Evidence regarding human papillomavirus testing in secondary prevention of cervical cancer.

evidence.text: Children homozygous for alpha(+)-thalassaemia require a 10% greater reduction in erythrocyte count than children of normal genotype for Hb concentration to fall to 50 g/l.
evidence.source: Increased Microerythrocyte Count in Homozygous α+-Thalassaemia Contributes to Protection against Severe Malarial Anaemia

evidence.source: Combined Single-Cell Functional and Gene Expression Analysis Resolves Heterogeneity within Stem Cell Populations

evidence.text: B cells differentiate into low-affinity plasma cells or high-affinity plasma cells and memory B cells.

evidence.text: PU.1 is essential for the ability of MOZ-TIF2 to establish and maintain AML stem cells.

evidence.text: Normal and cancer human mammary epithelial cells with increased aldehyde dehydrogenase activity (ALDH) have stem/progenitor properties.
